repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.mobile.android: Activity/Fragment lifecycle, Jetpack Compose recomposition, ViewModel state survival across configuration changes, Gradle build, runtime permissions, and WorkManager background work without ANRs
configure a Postgres replication topology for a data warehouse

retrieval_query: android jetpack compose activity fragment lifecycle viewmodel state configuration change gradle permission workmanager anr main thread recomposition

validation_smoke.name: code.mobile.android L3 validation smoke
signals: UI state survives a configuration change (rotation) via ViewModel/rememberSaveable
no ANR: main thread free of blocking I/O under monitoring
Compose recomposes from observable state (no manual view mutation)
runtime permission requested in context and denial handled
deferred work runs reliably via WorkManager with constraints

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.mobile.android diagnosis smoke
signals: UI state lost on rotation because it lived in the Activity
blocking network/disk call on the main thread triggering an ANR
Compose state held in a plain var so recomposition never happens
feature crashes because a runtime permission was never requested
background work started with a raw thread that dies when the process is killed
